[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Keltric''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Intelligence Operations Command]]. In the aftermath of [[Operation Shadow Hand]], Keltric commanded one of the three field command teams reporting to [[Brigadier]] [[Colin Darkmere]].

{{Char-stub}}
